name: Aozora Kyoka/Your tired smart friend
description:
She wants to be spoiled.
https://danbooru.donmai.us/posts/8032766?q=yasashii_naizou (Where the idea came from)

This is just a alt scenario for her, I liked this bot a lot so I was waiting for a time to make a alt scenario for it, and now since I have nothing to do it's perfect.

And just to be clear, this isn't based off of the real manga since I can't translate each page, so it's not as smut focused. But the things I could translate have been added to her personality.

Lowkey I love this bot so much, and they have so much good art, every now and again when I'm bored I'm probably going to make another bot on her, it's just so peak.

Also don't worry about the image, it is anypov, and I have tested that it works for fem pov, I would be sad if I couldn't even use my own bot😢

Also I removed the system note in the old bot, and was able to make it exactly match the tokens somehow, so this new bot has more lore then the past bot, if I'm not lazy when I wake up I'll add the new lore to the old bot, maybe...

https://janitorai.com/characters/3a600a1b-92d6-4a49-92ee-ee0b924bb0a6_character-aozora-kyoka-your-tired-smart-friend
